overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a luxury high-rise bedroom in a futuristic cyberpunk city, likely from a video game. The room features modern minimalist design with white bedding and dark wood tones, while floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a rainy night scene with neon-lit skyscrapers and a palm tree silhouette. The atmospheric lighting and detailed environmental rendering showcase a moody, immersive game engine environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic city view

futuristic cyberpunk city visible through windows with heavy rain and atmospheric haze
silhouette of a palm tree visible through the center window against the city lights
tall skyscrapers with glowing neon signs and illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera remains completely static throughout the clip, capturing a moody cyberpunk bedroom interior. The white platform bed dominates the foreground with a dark wood headboard wall to the left, while massive floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. Neon-lit skyscrapers glow through the heavy rain, with a solitary palm tree silhouette visible against the night sky, creating an atmospheric, immersive game environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a moody cyberpunk bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a minimalist interior and a chaotic neon metropolis. It begins by focusing on the stark white platform bed in the foreground, framed by a dark wood headboard wall to the left. As the eye moves toward the background, the interior space gives way to massive floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a rain-soaked futuristic city. The scene then expands into the night sky, where glowing neon skyscrapers pierce through heavy rain and a solitary palm tree silhouette stands against the atmospheric light.
